violations.text: Cases of beverages were observed stored on the floor in the concessions area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the cappuccino machine, serving counter and gaskets (2 dr lo boy) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
Spray bottle was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. - Shelving (counter tops) - Popcorn Machines - Dump Sinks New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
